TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_mcagaw_balay_na_mrkyas_tayal, title = mcagaw_balay_na_mrkyas_tayal, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/mcagaw_balay_na_mrkyas_tayal} }

S.FORM: == 調皮的泰雅青年 mcagaw balay na mrkyas tayal == 口述:Taro.Lesa 撰文:Ayu.Payas 這件事被調皮的青年Tali Yumin Losing Losing .耆老Losing Tali比他早一天去看陷阱.Tali 隻yungay .調皮的Tali gaga . Tali Yumin,於是兩人直接到Tali Yumin Losing ? Tali Yumin Tali Yumin 這hmeriq gaga :1.Tali Yumin .4.從此Tali Yumin gaga .

== 調皮的泰雅青年 mcagaw balay na mrkyas tayal == 口述:Taro.Lesa 撰文:Ayu.Payas 這件事被調皮的青年Tali Yumin Losing Losing .耆老Losing Tali比他早一天去看陷阱.Tali 隻yungay .調皮的Tali gaga . Tali Yumin,於是兩人直接到Tali Yumin Losing ? Tali Yumin Tali Yumin 這hmeriq gaga :1.Tali Yumin .4.從此Tali Yumin gaga .
S.PHON: == ******* mʦ~ʨaɣaw βalaj na mrkjas~ɕ tajal == **:taro.les~ɕa **:aju.pajas~ɕ *********tali jumin los~ɕiŋ los~ɕiŋ .**los~ɕiŋ tali*********.tali *juŋaj .***tali ɣaɣa . tali jumin,*******tali jumin los~ɕiŋ ? tali jumin tali jumin *ħmeriq ɣaɣa :*.tali jumin .*.**tali jumin ɣaɣa .
